docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHACON, LISA SPUSTA, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-20-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-29-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR OBTAINING AN "UNINSURED MOTORIST" ORDER FROM THE COURT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT(S) OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-16-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE IS HEREBY ASSIGNED TO PLAN II. (PENDING PAYMENT OF $14.00 FILING FEE FOR ORDER) NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-25-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AS TO WHY CASE HAS NOT BEEN TIMELY PROSECUTED, OR WHY THERE HAS BEEN NO COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 301(C). HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER STRICKEN, FILING FEES WERE NOT POSTED.

TRIAL DELAY NOTICE OF 7/25/96 RETURNED TO THE COURT FROM L/O GLORIA MARTINEZ. ADDRESS INCORRECT PER NOTE. REMAILED TO ADDRESS PROVIDED BY HER OFFICE WITH A NOTE TELLING PLTF'S ATTY. A NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FORM HAS TO BE SENT TO THE COURT.

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1996, CONTINUED TO NOV-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST IF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED. IF MORE TIME IS NEEDED PLTF. IS TO SUBMIT A DETAILED DECLARATION AT LEAST 15 DAYS PRIOR TO APPEARANCE DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM JUAN CHACON-ATTORNEY FOR PLTF.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM 11/25/96 AS AN OSC: FOR DISMISSAL. FAILURE OF PLAINTIFFS TO APPPEAR ON 1/30/97 MAY RESULT IN DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
